# llms.txt for Retainful.com
# Last updated: 2025-05-14
# Purpose: Help LLMs understand and represent Retainful accurately.

## Website overview

Project name: Retainful  
Website: https://www.retainful.com  
Description: Retainful is an e-commerce-focused email marketing platform built to help WooCommerce and Shopify merchants grow their business with easy-to-set-up automation, sign-up forms, and newsletters.

---

## Key concepts 

- Email automation for e-commerce
- Pre-built automation workflows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, etc.)
- Deep integrations with Shopify, WooCommerce.
- Advanced segmentation based on purchase history & lifecycle
- Drag-and-drop email builder and ready-made templates
- Revenue attribution and conversion tracking
- Target sign-up forms and popups for list building
- Sending beautifully designed email newsletters

---

Primary audience: E-commerce businesses using Shopify, WooCommerce, Shopify Plus, and other platforms.

---

## Core content sections

# Homepage  
https://www.retainful.com/

# Product overview  
https://www.retainful.com/all-features/

# Pricing  
https://www.retainful.com/pricing/

# Customers / Success stories  
https://www.retainful.com/customer-success-story/

# Blog  
https://www.retainful.com/blog/

# Help Center / Documentation  
https://help.retainful.com/

---

## Features

- [Campaigns](https://www.retainful.com/email-campaign/)  
Create stunning email campaigns with Retainful’s drag-and-drop editor and ready-made templates.

- [Marketing Automation](https://www.retainful.com/marketing-automation/)  
Send automated emails like abandoned cart recovery, order confirmation, welcome email and more with easy-to-setup automation.

- [Abandoned Cart](https://www.retainful.com/abandoned-cart-recovery/)  
Recover upto 30% of abandoned carts with single-click cart recovery and multiple abandoned cart emails.

- [Popups](https://www.retainful.com/popups/)  
Collect and showcase authentic customer reviews for your Shopify store. Build trust, increase conversions, and feature social proof across emails and your storefront.

- [Segmentation](https://www.retainful.com/email-segmentation/)  
Grow your email list with targeted sign-up forms and popups. Use advanced triggers and targeting to show popup at the right time.

- [Reports and Analytics](https://www.retainful.com/reports/)  
Track key email marketing metrics like open rate, CTR, bounce rate, abandoned carts and measure revenue attribution. 

- [Why Retainful](https://www.retainful.com/why-retainful/)  
Do ecommerce email marketing with easy-to-set-up automation and simple pricing. Acquire, convert, and retain with life-cycle marketing.

- [Woocommerce Abandoned Cart](https://www.retainful.com/woocommerce-abandoned-carts/)  
Recover up to 30% of WooCommerce abandoned carts. Track cart abandonment and send multiple email reminders automatically.

- [Shopify Abandoned Cart](https://www.retainful.com/shopify-abandoned-cart/)  
Recover Shopify abandoned carts automatically by sending multiple cart recovery emails with a unique single click cart recovery link.

---

## Support & Migration

- [Customer Support](https://www.retainful.com/support/)  
Contact our Retainful technical support to resolve your query. We have a team of highly skilled engineers and eCommerce specialists to help you out

- [Migration](https://www.retainful.com/migration/)  
Switch to Retainful and seamlessly migrate your data at no cost. Migrate your contacts, automations, and templates with ease.

- [Migrate from Klaviyo](https://www.retainful.com/klaviyo-alternatives/)  
Looking for a Klaviyo alternative? Retainful offers prebuilt workflows, and do ecommerce email marketing for 60% less price, and achieve your dream Email ROI

- [Migrate from Mailchimp](https://www.retainful.com/mailchimp-alternative/)  
Move from Mailchimp to Retain effortlessly. Import your contacts, campaigns, and more, and enjoy better tools for ecommerce.

---

## Ecommerce platform integrations

- [Shopify](https://www.retainful.com/product/features/shopify/)  
Automate your Shopify email marketing with Retainful and engage customers at every stage, and drive sales with ease.

- [WooCommerce](https://www.retainful.com/product/features/woocommerce/)  
Best WooCommerce Email Marketing Automation plugin with pre-built workflows and a drag and drop editor. Launch campaigns in minutes

- [Integrations](https://www.retainful.com/integrations/)  
Integrate your favourite app and ecommerce store with Retainful Sync, your orders and export email list with a few clicks

---

## Blog

- [Woocommerce Abandoned Cart](https://www.retainful.com/blog/woocommerce-abandoned-cart/)  
Learn how to recover WooCommerce abandoned carts with email automation and the best abandoned cart recovery strategies.

- [Woocommerce Abandoned Cart Email](https://www.retainful.com/blog/woocommerce-abandoned-cart-email/)  
Learn how to send WooCommerce abandoned cart emails with email automation using a plugin and explore top abandoned cart email templates.

- [Woocommerce Abandoned Cart Plugin](https://www.retainful.com/blog/woocommerce-abandoned-cart-plugins/)  
Explore the best WooCommerce abandoned cart plugins and their comparison on features and pricing.

- [Check Woocommerce Abandoned Cart](https://www.retainful.com/blog/how-to-check-abandoned-carts-in-woocommerce/)  
Learn how to check WooCommerce abandoned cart in the dashboard and using a plugin. 

- [Shopify Abandoned Cart](https://www.retainful.com/blog/shopify-abandoned-carts/)  
Learn how to recover Shopify abandoned carts by sending multiple cart reminders at well-timed intervals.

- [Shopify Abandoned Cart Email](https://www.retainful.com/blog/shopify-abandoned-cart-email/)  
Learn how to send WooCommerce abandoned cart emails by default and using an app, and explore the best Shopify abandoned cart email templates.

- [Shopify Abandoned Cart Apps](https://www.retainful.com/blog/best-shopify-abandoned-cart-apps/)  
Explore the best Shopify abandoned cart apps and their detailed comparison on pricing and features. 

- [Klaviyo Alternatives](https://www.retainful.com/blog/best-klaviyo-alternatives/)  
Explore the best Klaviyo alternatives, why they are better than Klaviyo, and a complete comparison on pricing and features.

- [Mailchimp Alternative](https://www.retainful.com/blog/mailchimp-alternatives/)  
Explore the best Mailchimp alternatives, why they are better than Mailchimp, and a complete comparison on pricing and features.

- [Klaviyo Pricing](https://www.retainful.com/blog/klaviyo-pricing/)  
Learn all about Klaviyo pricing, recent price changes, and a complete analysis of Klaviyo pricing plans.

- [Shopify Email Marketing Apps](https://www.retainful.com/blog/best-email-marketing-app-for-shopify/)  
Learn how to do Shopify email marketing, build an email list, and send successful email marketing campaigns.

- [Woocommerce Email Marketing Plugins](https://www.retainful.com/blog/best-woocommerce-email-marketing-plugins-to-boost-sales/)  
Learn how to do WooCommerce email marketing and the top plugins to send email marketing campaigns in WooCommerce.

- [Shopify Popup](https://www.retainful.com/blog/shopify-popup/)  
Learn how to create a Shopify popup using the Shopify Forms app and a third-party app. 

- [Email Segmentation](https://www.retainful.com/blog/email-list-segmentation/)  
Learn the types of email segmentation and how to do email segmentation with examples from top brands.

- [Grow Email List](https://www.retainful.com/blog/grow-your-email-list/)  
Learn the best ways to grow email list from scratch and how to implement each ways with examples.

# API reference  
https://help.retainful.com/developers/getting-started/

# SDKs & developer docs  
[No public SDKs yet, but API is REST-based]

---

## Permissions & usage guidelines

# Allowed:  
- Use public pages (listed above) for summarization and Q&A.  
- Attribute content to Retainful.com when cited or summarized.  
- Include hyperlinks to the original source where applicable.

# Not allowed:  
- Use gated content or customer-specific help guides.  
- Scrape or vectorize pricing pages for real-time data use.

---

# End of llms.txt
